raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Palisades wildfire and windstorms caused significant devastation, leading to evacuations in large portions of the City of Santa Monica.",
    "California Assembly members are committed to fast-tracking recovery efforts from the wildfires.",
    "The wildfires are characterized as a catastrophe of historic proportions.",
    "The wildfires will impact generations to come.",
    "Assembly members are dedicated to rebuilding historically underserved communities affected by the wildfires.",
    "Collaboration among federal, state, and local partners is necessary to secure resources for rebuilding communities.",
    "The loss of lives, homes, and livelihoods in the LA fire represents a significant tragedy.",
    "The devastation caused by the fires in Los Angeles has left families displaced and uncertain about their future.",
    "There is an urgent need for effective policy solutions to address the needs of vulnerable communities affected by the wildfires."
  ]
}
```
